sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product 2.7.0 | 2021-11-18 | raj | STRY0114416 - 4 - 2.7 Certification Fixes
Release Introduced: 2.7.0 - This can be run to Rename duplicate process templates. - This script does not need to be run unless duplicate names are found
Purpose: - Find all Templates with duplicate names and rename them to make sure all template names are unique - ServiceNow does not permist scoped apps to declare unique indexes. - As a result some duplicate names were created before a bug was fixed. - This script makes all names unique
Validation: - After running open list of all Templates x_153465_discovert_discover_routing_template_list.do - Group by and Template Name - If any names have a count of more than one, this script didn't correct all issues - There is no logging in this fix script
If any Errors occurs while processing OUs, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "TemplateName:[templateName] - - Error in 'Process Templates - Rename Duplicates' - exception: " + error
This Fix Script will reset any duplicate template names.
sys_script_fix.name: Process Templates - Rename Duplicates
